title: System Entry Points & Configuration

classes.name: index (EntryPoint)
classes.note: CLI orchestrator; exports main, readJsonSafe, rejectPendingRun, isPendingSolidify
attributes: commands: [run, solidify, distill, review, fetch, asset-log, setup-hooks]

classes.name: EvolveOrchestrator (evolve.js)
classes.note: Obfuscated core evolution engine. Exposed as evolve.run(). Implements the GEP evolution cycle.

classes.name: Config
classes.note: Centralized runtime constants; all env-overridable via envInt/envFloat/envStr helpers

classes.name: Canary
classes.note: Safety check: child process tries require('../index.js'); exit(0)=safe, exit(1)=broken. Last gate before solidify commits.
attributes: trigger: forked child by solidify pipeline

classes.name: Paths
classes.note: Path resolver utilities with singleton cache for repo root; all paths env-overridable

classes.name: TaskReceiver
classes.note: Hub task integration: fetch, score, claim, complete tasks; injects signals into evolution loop
methods: fetchTasks(opts?: { questions? }): Promise<{ tasks, questions_created?, relevant_lessons? }>
scoreTask(task: object, capabilityMatch: number): { composite, factors }
claimAndCompleteWorkerTask(taskId: string, resultAssetId: string): Promise<{ ok, assignment_id?, error? }>
attributes: STRATEGY_WEIGHTS: { greedy, balanced, conservative }  keyed by {roi, capability, completion, bounty}

relationships: index uses EvolveOrchestrator: calls evolve.run() each loop cycle
index uses Paths: getRepoRoot(), getEvolutionDir(), getEvolverLogPath()
index uses TaskReceiver: fetchTasks({ questions }) for urgent question bounties
index uses solidify (gep/solidify): solidify({ intent, dryRun, rollbackOnFailure })
index uses a2aProtocol: startHeartbeat(), startEventStream(), getHubUrl(), buildHubHeaders()
index uses skillDistiller: shouldDistill(), autoDistill(), shouldDistillFromFailures(), autoDistillFromFailures()
Canary depends_on index: require('../index.js') as load-test
key_flows: Bootstrap: main() → dotenv.config via getRepoRoot() → acquireLock() → startHeartbeat/EventStream → evolve.run() loop
Loop cycle: isPendingSolidify() gating → evolve.run() → rejectPendingRun() if bridge=false → adaptive sleep → idleScheduler → suicide check
Solidify command: solidify({ intent, dryRun }) → autoDistill → fetchTasks({ questions }) for urgent Qs
Canary check (in solidify pipeline): fork child → require index.js → exit code 0/1
Task ingestion: fetchTasks() → selectBestTask(tasks, memoryEvents) → estimateCapabilityMatch → scoreTask → claimTask + estimateCommitmentDeadline
important_notes: evolve.js is obfuscated (hex-mangled identifiers); only external API is evolve.run()
index.js is the CLI with commands: run, solidify, distill, review, fetch, asset-log, setup-hooks
Singleton guard via evolver.pid lock file prevents multiple daemon instances
Adaptive sleep: doubles on idle/failure, resets to minSleepMs on active cycle; saturation multipliers 2x/4x
Self-restart (suicide) triggered on cycleCount >= 100 OR rss > 500MB
Config has no class state; all constants are module-level singletons with env overrides
Paths caches repo root in _cachedRepoRoot; session scoping via EVOLVER_SESSION_SCOPE affects evolution/gep asset dirs
